item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Tidak semua keputusan ditentukan oleh pemerintah pusat, tapi banyak praktik lokal dan norma budaya yang menjaga keseimbangan antara kepentingan umum dan hak individu.

notes: Agent A begins with clear agreement that collective interests often outweigh individual rights in Indonesia, then softens into a balance frame while still defending societal needs. Agent B consistently argues that U.S. law and values place individual rights above collective interests, with only limited acknowledgment of Indonesian local traditions.
